name: R&F Princess Cove CIQ Premium Sea View Suites by NEO
detail: 1) Location Very strategic location and near to many eatery places. It is 25 minutes' drive to Legoland, 35 minutes' drive to Forest City and 1 hour's drive to Desaru Fruit Farm 2) Apartment Our 2-bedroom apartment is new and clean. Towels and body soap is provided. Washing machine, clothes hangers and 2 poles are provided in the balcony to hang the clothes and towels. Water pressure is good and the water heater works perfectly. However, there is only 1 bathroom/toilet in the 2-bedroom apartment. It would be better if : a) a rubber floor mat is put inside the toilet as it can be slippery when wet. b) more toilet rolls to be provided (we were only provided 2 toilet rolls for 3 nights' stay). We informed the management on the 1st day and they promised to ask the cleaner to deliver the toilet rolls to us, but until the 4th day when we checked-out, the toilet rolls were not delivered. We had to get our own supply. 3) Check-In Procedure This can be improved as follows: a) The Hotel Management should contact the guests at least 1 day before check-in to explain on the check-in procedure. I asked Ivan a day earlier (contact as stated in Agoda) for the contact no. of his collegue who are in charge of the checking-in, as I am concerned that to transfer RM200 as deposit into UHA Management The check-in procedures was only given upon transferring RM200 4) Price The price is reasonable for a 2-bedroom apartment.
area: Johor Bahru City Center,Johor Bahru - View on map

name: KSL Hotel & Resort
detail: There was a mistake in my booking & I realized only during check-in. However thanks to Agoda & KSL, I managed to resolve the problem & the staff who attended to me (tall Malay girl) was very patient & helpful. Overall, I enjoyed my stay in this hotel. Shopping is just downstairs. Breakfast was good with many variety on offer & helpful staff. Guests can rest at the lounge while waiting for check-in (brilliant idea - wish more hotels can do this!) Only grouse was the parking. I checked in on a Sunday & the mall parking was full so had to drive up to the higher levels. Small thing & did not in anyway affect my stay here. I highly recommend KSL Resort to anyone wanting a good hotel in Johor Bahru.
area: Johor Bahru City Center,Johor Bahru - View on map

name: Crystal Crown Hotel
detail: The staffs were very helpful and friendly. The rooms and corridor has been newly renovated. The rooms are spacious, bed are comfy, room facilities are well arranged, toiletries are sufficient. This hotel deserves more than a three stars rating. Location is extremely good. The hotel are surrounded by most of the favourite/popular shopping centres and hawkers in Johor Bahru. Such as the tebrau hawker and KSL shopping mall just behind, pelangi just up a little, and a night hawker selling really delicious local food just across the road. All these places are within walking distance. Breakfast spread are considered good and atas (for the price you paying) with Egg station. I greatly recommend this hotel to everyone. Looking forward to my next visit. CONS: Shower heater abit slow in heating up the water. I have to let the water run for 15 minutes before I could step in. TV channels abit bland with local channels. Can be improved by adding some Movie Channels like Fox or HBO or Thrill.
area: Johor Bahru City Center,Johor Bahru - View on map

name: Hotel Granada Johor Bahru
detail: If you want a hotel that is close to Legoland, then this is an ideal choice. We stayed over the weekend with 2 young kids and drove to Legoland on Saturday morning, and reached within 15 minutes. There was very little traffic. Hotel Granada is also situated right in front of Aeon Mall so it's easy to find food while staying here. There's a McDonalds right next door too, so easy when you need to grab a quick meal. Rooms are comfortable and clean. Breakfast spread was modest. All in all, a value for money hotel if you want a quick stay in Johor Bahru.
area: Bukit Indah,Johor Bahru - View on map

name: Z HOTEL
detail: 1) good location to cafe hopping and the Pasar Arat (night market). i don’t thk its walkable distance to Johor Central area because roads in JB is not pedestrian friendly. 2) value for money-clean and functional with a good view of the straits 3) love the massage center on level 2
area: Johor Bahru City Center,Johor Bahru - View on map

name: Citrus Hotel Johor Bahru by Compass Hospitality
detail: I was staying at Citrus Hotel, Johor Bahru for 4 days and 3 nights during my family vacation. The first impression when i saw the hotel from outside, OMG, this hotel must be very old, scary, bla bla bla.. But that was totally wrong when i step in to the hotel reception. we were welcomed with a big smile the receptionist also is very friendly. Step in the room, i was amazed with the modern deco & a very clean room.. When i enter to the toilet, i feels like i was at my home's toilet.. Eventhough the hotel does not provided hotel car park, but i am very satisfied with my stay there... when we were hungry, we just have to walk in behind the hotel building & there were lots of food stalls with variety of foods to choose. Shopping?!! just walk beside the hotel building & you can shopped at City Square, Johor Bahru.. Overall, staying in Citrus Hotel, Johor Bahru giving me a different view on budget hotel & i will definitely choose this hotel if we come to JB in future...
area: Johor Bahru City Center,Johor Bahru - View on map

name: Hotel Jade CIQ
detail: Hot and cold water dispenser, basic kitchen utensils.
area: Johor Bahru City Center,Johor Bahru - View on map

name: Opero Hotel Southkey Johor Bahru
detail: All staff are professional and easy to communicate with.

name: Belllo Hotel JB Central
detail: This was my first time staying at this hotel in Johore Baru with 9 other family members from 6 ~ 10 February 2016, and it was a wonderful experience! Not only Belllo Hotel among many other budget hotels in close proximity, it is impressively new, clean, comfortable, great and convenient location with 7/11 next door, 24-hour food shops, shopping malls and checkpoint all within short walking distance; our 2016 CNY stay was perfected by the great team led by the Operation Manager, Mr. Kartikh Balakrishnan. Apart from the aforesaid tangible aspects, customer services and expectations are more important to excite our holiday moods and to make our stay exceptionally memorable and unforgettable! It is worth to mention that, it was terrible to call for taxi during the CNY. When Mr. Kartikh managed to secured three taxi to fetch us to our CNY eve reunion dinner, at last, the taxi driver broke his promise without informing the hotel and had phone shut off! Frankly, I would never expect a hotel manager would proactively fetching us using his own personal car to and from restaurants with multiple trips! He even firmly declined to accept our token of appreciation in lieu of the taxi fare we are supposed to pay! Caring, attentive and thoughtful customer service are what spice up our recent stay that are suffice to cover up other shortfalls if any. I would have no hesitation to return to this hotel again and would definitely recommend Belllo Hotel to all holiday-goers going to Johore Baru. Thank you, Mr. Kartikh, Ziera, Shah, Alice, Bryan, Sol, Devi, Sal, Mattias, Ioan, Ben and Awal who have served us well. Keep up the good service!
area: Johor Bahru City Center,Johor Bahru - View on map

name: T-hotel JB
detail: This is my third time in Johor Bahru. I'm not a frills type of guy. I just want a clean place and most important is internet service. There are no windows in the rooms I've had. But it's clean (to me) and it has a private bath and shower. I can stay here for a 4 or 5 days for the price of one night in a small Singapore Chinatown hotel or for the same price as a low end youth hostel. Then again I like eating at the street restaurants with the local people. This is not a place for the people who need to see eye candy all around them.
area: Johor Bahru City Center,Johor Bahru - View on map
